DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF ADRIAN JESUS FERNANDEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM TO THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IN WORD FORM AND IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 (APPROVAL AS TO FORM) TO JUDGE PRO TEM RENNE AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTANT WITH HIS POSITIONS DISCUSSED IN TODAY'S HEARING IN WORD FORM AND IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 (APPROVAL AS TO FORM) TO JUDGE PRO TEM RENNE AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

All Parties present stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne hear today's motion. Judge Pro Tem and counsel authorize the clerk to sign the Judge Pro Tem stipulation.

Hearing is held. NOT ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ADRIAN JESUS FERNANDEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One is taken under submission.

Counsel for Plaintiff is to submit a proposed order that is verbatim to the Court's tentative ruling in word form and is in compliance with CRC 3.1312 (approval as to form) to Judge Pro Tem Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Counsel for Defendant is to submit a proposed order consistant with his positions discussed in today's hearing in word form and is in compliance with CRC 3.1312 (approval as to form) to Judge Pro Tem Renne at rennepar85@gmail.com.
